title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions!
